column.name: report_sql
column.value:
select y.`Currency` ,y.`Cashier Name` ,y. `Teller Name` ,y.`Branch` ,y.`entityType` as 'Entity' ,y.`trxnDate` as 'Trxn Date' ,y.`trxnId` as 'Trxn No' ,y.`Description` ,y.`Act No` as 'Account No' ,Case when y.`trxnType` in (101,103) then y.`trxnAmount` else 0 end as 'Cash In' ,Case when y.`trxnType` in (102,104) then y.`trxnAmount` else 0 end as 'Cash Out'
from ( select * from ( select o.id as 'officeId' , o.name as 'Branch', t.id as 'tellerId', t.name as 'Teller Name', cht.cashier_id as 'cashierId' ,s.display_name as 'Cashier Name', cht.id as 'trxnId', cht.txn_type as 'trxnType', cht.txn_amount as 'trxnAmount' ,cht.txn_date as 'trxnDate', cht.txn_note as 'Description', cht.entity_id as 'entityId', null as 'Act No' ,cht.entity_type as 'entityType', cht.created_date as 'createdDate', cht.currency_code as 'currencyId' , oc.name as 'Currency'
from m_cashier_transactions cht left join m_cashiers c on c.id = cht.cashier_id left join m_tellers t on t.id = c.teller_id left join m_office o on o.id = t.office_id left join m_staff s on s.id = c.staff_id left join m_organisation_currency oc on oc.code = cht.currency_code
where (cht.cashier_id = ${cashierId} or '-1' = ${cashierId}) AND ( Date(cht.txn_date) between '${startDate}' AND '${endDate}' ) ) cashier_txns
union
(select o.id as 'officeId',o.name as 'Branch', t.id as 'tellerId', t.name as 'Teller Name', c.id as 'cashierId', staff.display_name as 'Cashier Name' ,sat.id as 'trxnId' ,case when renum.enum_value in ('deposit','withdrawal fee', 'Pay Charge', 'Annual Fee') then 103 when renum.enum_value in ('withdrawal', 'Waive Charge', 'Interest Posting', 'Overdraft Interest', '') then 104 else 105 end as 'trxnType' ,sat.amount as 'trxnAmount' ,sat.transaction_date as 'trxnDate' ,case when g.id is null then concat(renum.enum_value, ' ',' for ', cl.id, ' - ',cl.display_name,' ',trim(n.note)) else concat(renum.enum_value, ' ',' Grp ', g.id,' for ', cl.id, ' - ',cl.display_name,' ',trim(n.note)) end as 'Description'
,sav.id as 'entityId' ,sav.account_no as 'Act No' ,'Savings' as 'entityType' ,sat.created_date as 'createdDate' ,sav.currency_code as 'currencyId' ,oc.name as 'Currency'
from m_savings_account_transaction sat left join r_enum_value renum on sat.transaction_type_enum = renum.enum_id and renum.enum_name = 'savings_transaction_type_enum' left join m_savings_account sav on sat.savings_account_id = sav.id left join m_client cl on sav.client_id = cl.id left join m_group_client gc on gc.client_id = cl.id left join m_group g on g.id = gc.group_id left join m_office o on cl.office_id = o.id left join m_appuser user on sat.appuser_id = user.id left join m_staff staff on user.staff_id = staff.id left join m_cashiers c on c.staff_id = staff.id left join m_tellers t on t.id = c.teller_id join m_payment_detail payDetails on payDetails.id = sat.payment_detail_id LEFT JOIN m_note n ON n.savings_account_id = sav.id AND n.savings_account_transaction_id = sat.id left join m_payment_type payType on payType.id = payDetails.payment_type_id left join m_account_transfer_transaction acnttrans on (acnttrans.from_savings_transaction_id = sat.id or acnttrans.to_savings_transaction_id = sat.id) left join m_organisation_currency oc on oc.code = sav.currency_code
where sat.is_reversed = 0 and (c.id = ${cashierId} or '-1' = ${cashierId}) and sat.transaction_date between '${startDate}' and '${endDate}' and renum.enum_value in ('deposit','withdrawal fee', 'Pay Charge', 'withdrawal', 'Annual Fee', 'Waive Charge', 'Interest Posting', 'Overdraft Interest') and (sat.payment_detail_id IS NULL OR payType.is_cash_payment = 1) AND acnttrans.id IS NULL )
union all ( select o.id as 'officeId' ,o.name as 'Branch' ,t.id as 'tellerId' ,t.name as 'Teller Name' ,c.id as 'cashierId' ,staff.display_name as 'Cashier Name' ,lt.id as 'trxnId'
,case when renum.enum_value in ('REPAYMENT_AT_DISBURSEMENT','REPAYMENT', 'RECOVERY_REPAYMENT', 'CHARGE_PAYMENT') then 103 when renum.enum_value in ('DISBURSEMENT', 'WAIVE_INTEREST', 'WRITEOFF', 'WAIVE_CHARGES') then 104 else 105 end as 'trxnType' ,lt.amount as 'trxnAmount' ,lt.transaction_date as 'trxnDate'
,case when g.id is null then concat(renum.enum_value, ' ',' for ', cl.id, ' - ',cl.display_name,' ',trim(n.note)) else concat(renum.enum_value, ' ',' Grp ', g.id,' for ', cl.id, ' - ',cl.display_name,' ',trim(n.note)) end as 'Description'
,loan.id as 'entityId' ,loan.account_no as 'Act No' ,'Loans' as 'entityType' ,lt.created_date as 'createdDate'
,loan.currency_code as 'currencyId' ,oc.name as 'Currency'
from m_loan_transaction lt left join r_enum_value renum on lt.transaction_type_enum = renum.enum_id and renum.enum_name = 'loan_transaction_type_enum' left join m_loan loan on lt.loan_id = loan.id left join m_client cl on loan.client_id = cl.id left join m_group_client gc on gc.client_id = cl.id left join m_group g on g.id = gc.group_id left join m_office o on cl.office_id = o.id left join m_appuser user on lt.appuser_id = user.id left join m_staff staff on user.staff_id = staff.id left join m_cashiers c on c.staff_id = staff.id left join m_tellers t on t.id = c.teller_id left join m_payment_detail payDetails on payDetails.id = lt.payment_detail_id left JOIN m_note n on n.loan_id = loan.id AND n.loan_transaction_id = lt.id left join m_payment_type payType on payType.id = payDetails.payment_type_id left join m_account_transfer_transaction acnttrans on (acnttrans.from_loan_transaction_id = lt.id or acnttrans.to_loan_transaction_id = lt.id) left join m_organisation_currency oc on oc.code = loan.currency_code
where lt.is_reversed = 0 and (c.id = ${cashierId} or '-1' = ${cashierId}) and lt.transaction_date between '${startDate}' and '${endDate}' and renum.enum_value in ('REPAYMENT_AT_DISBURSEMENT','REPAYMENT', 'RECOVERY_REPAYMENT','DISBURSEMENT', 'CHARGE_PAYMENT', 'WAIVE_CHARGES', 'WAIVE_INTEREST', 'WRITEOFF') and (lt.payment_detail_id IS NULL OR payType.is_cash_payment = 1) AND acnttrans.id IS NULL )
UNION ALL ( select o.id as 'officeId' ,o.name as 'Branch' ,t.id as 'tellerId' ,t.name as 'Teller Name' ,c.id AS 'cashierId' ,staff.display_name as 'Cashier Name' ,ct.id AS 'trxnId' ,case when renum.enum_value in ('PAY_CHARGE') then 103 when renum.enum_value in ('WAIVE_CHARGE') then 104 else 105 end as 'trxnType' ,ct.amount as 'trxnAmount' ,ct.transaction_date as 'trxnDate'
,case when g.id is null then concat(renum.enum_value, ' ',' for ', cl.id, ' - ',cl.display_name) else concat(renum.enum_value, ' ',' Grp ', g.id,' for ', cl.id, ' - ',cl.display_name) end as 'Description'
,cl.id as 'entityId' ,cl.account_no as 'Act No' ,'Clients' as 'entityType' ,ct.created_date as 'createdDate'
,ct.currency_code as 'currencyId' ,oc.name as 'Currency'
from m_client_transaction ct left join r_enum_value renum on ct.transaction_type_enum = renum.enum_id AND renum.enum_name = 'client_transaction_type_enum' left join m_client cl on ct.client_id = cl.id left join m_group_client gc on gc.client_id = cl.id left join m_group g on g.id = gc.group_id left join m_office o on cl.office_id = o.id left join m_appuser user on ct.appuser_id = user.id left join m_staff staff on user.staff_id = staff.id left join m_cashiers c on c.staff_id = staff.id left join m_tellers t on t.id = c.teller_id left join m_payment_detail payDetails on payDetails.id = ct.payment_detail_id left join m_payment_type payType on payType.id = payDetails.payment_type_id left join m_organisation_currency oc on oc.code = ct.currency_code
where (c.id = ${cashierId} or '-1' = ${cashierId}) and ct.transaction_date between '${startDate}' and '${endDate}' and renum.enum_value in ('PAY_CHARGE', 'WAIVE_CHARGE') and (ct.payment_detail_id IS NULL OR payType.is_cash_payment = 1) and ct.is_reversed = 0 ) )y where (y.`officeId` = ${officeId} or '1' = ${officeId}) order by y.`currencyId`, y.`trxnDate`,y.`Cashier Name`,y.`Description`, y.`Teller Name`

column.name: parameter_sql
column.value: select mc.id, display_name from m_cashiers mc join m_staff ms on mc.staff_id =ms.id where ms.office_id = ${officeId}

column.name: parameter_sql
column.value: select t.id ,t.name as `name` from m_tellers t join m_office mo on t.office_id = mo.id where mo.id = ${officeId} or ${officeId} = 1

column.name: report_id
column.valueComputed: (select id from stretchy_report where report_name = 'Teller Transactions Report')

column.name: report_id
column.valueComputed: (select id from stretchy_report where report_name = 'Teller Transactions Report')

column.name: report_id
column.valueComputed: (select id from stretchy_report where report_name = 'Teller Transactions Report')

column.name: report_id
column.valueComputed: (select id from stretchy_report where report_name = 'Teller Transactions Report')

column.name: report_id
column.valueComputed: (select id from stretchy_report where report_name = 'Teller Transactions Report')
